title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies:
Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies!
